name: demoqa-cypress-test
description: Cypress tests for DemoQA practice form using Cucumber and Allure

scripts.report:open: cypress run --spec cypress/e2e/features/automation_practice_form.feature && npm run allure:generate && npm run allure:open
scripts.cypress:interactive: cypress run --headed --browser chrome --spec cypress/e2e/features/automation_practice_form.feature && npm run allure:generate && npm run allure:open
